title: Plush
description: 100 Player and Youtuber Plushies added to Minecraft!
body:
# Plush

Simple Plushies



![ForFabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg)
![NO FORGE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/unsupported/forge_vector.svg)



# 📖About

I have currently added **50 Plushies** to the Plush mod!
Another 50 to go. I might update it to newer Versions once I have added all the 100 Plushies, but till then feel free to submit your username for your own plushie in the Discord! A video will come once we reach 100 Plushies!
